Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wakatsu Kitchen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's too crowded right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Prodigy Platter - 680 yen[n]Get smarter while you digest!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eating here might help with[n]my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the night here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Good news for regulars!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"We're offering you a Seafood[n]Full Course on {f 0 1 2}Monday, Thursday,{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}Friday, and Sunday nights{f 0 1 27}!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20402 0 0}They know me as a regular customer![n]I wonder if it's due to my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll try the Seafood Full Course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A regular customer is ordering[n]the Seafood Full Course...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like a special offer for[n]regulars on {f 0 1 2}Monday, Thursday,{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}Friday, and Sunday nights{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe if my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} was at least[n]{f 4 31 1 3 1 0}, I'd be a memorable enough[n]customer to be able to order it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still order[n]the Prodigy Platter...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still order the[n]Seafood Full Course...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like the[n]staff recognize me yet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe if my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} was at least[n]{f 4 31 1 3 1 0}, I'd be a memorable enough[n]customer to be able to order it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wakatsu Kitchen[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I order...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A meal rich in omega-3s[n]to stimulate the brain.[n]Raises {f 4 30 0 1 0 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A seafood course that[n]gets brain juices flowing.[n]Raises {f 4 30 0 1 0 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's the Promised Day...[n]I should head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
